## Summary

Explain the problem and the focused change that solves it.

## Type

- [ ] Web interface / UX
- [ ] Payload
- [ ] Installer / Pi-Tail compatibility
- [ ] Runtime / API
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests / maintenance

## Validation

List commands, phone viewport, Kali image, Pi model, adapters, and other hardware used.

## Safety and compatibility

- [ ] I considered the phone/Pi management route and cleanup behavior.
- [ ] I did not include tokens, credentials, captures, loot, personal data, or real target information.
- [ ] Testing was performed only on systems/devices I own or was explicitly authorized to test.
- [ ] New or changed payload behavior matches its metadata and description.
- [ ] I updated documentation where user-visible behavior changed.

## Screenshots

Include before/after phone screenshots for visible interface changes, with sensitive data removed.
